response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music detected in the reference JSON; VTuber commentary and game audio are transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON is correct regarding the lack of vocal music, so 100% manual transcription of the VTuber dialogue has been performed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to capture rapid, casual speech and background comments from other players on the server.

subtitles.original: Why not leave the box? I have trust issues.
subtitles.english: Why not leave the box? I have trust issues.

subtitles.original: Oh, we already got three boxes, okay.
subtitles.english: Oh, we already got three boxes, okay.

subtitles.original: おお、スイカですか？スイカ。
そうだよ、スイカだよ。スイカいっぱいだ。
イイナは何売ってんの？
え、でもイイナもファーマー？
subtitles.english: Wait, but Ina is also a farmer?

subtitles.original: イイナ！ファーマー、最後まで頑張ろうね。
subtitles.english: Ina! Let's do our best as farmers until the end.

subtitles.original: マネー！マネー！金取り！金取り！本当金。
subtitles.english: Money! Money! Taking the money! Taking the money! Real money.

subtitles.original: 俺の分は忘れないで、はい。
I forgot... I forgot what I was gonna say.
subtitles.english: I forgot... I forgot what I was gonna say.

subtitles.original: What was it? Why did I lose track?
subtitles.english: What was it? Why did I lose track?

subtitles.original: あ、ラミィ！ししろんはいらないよって。
subtitles.english: Oh, Lamy! Tell Shishiron we don't need it.

subtitles.original: ね、一旦全部集めたって。
subtitles.english: Hey, they said we should gather everything first.

subtitles.original: Oh wait, we need another... Hold on, we'll deposit this.
subtitles.english: Oh wait, we need another... Hold on, we'll deposit this.

subtitles.original: Oh, we have extra job points.
subtitles.english: Oh, we have extra job points.

subtitles.original: I do need three to use the brush, right?
subtitles.english: I do need three to use the brush, right?

subtitles.original: ネガティブに行けるんだ！ You can, you can go into the negatives!
subtitles.english: You can go into the negatives! You can, you can go into the negatives!

subtitles.original: But you don't get much from alchemy either, no?
subtitles.english: But you don't get much from alchemy either, no?

subtitles.original: Oh wait, we have points left.
subtitles.english: Oh wait, we have points left.

subtitles.original: No, there's only two points left. We only got five extra points.
subtitles.english: No, there's only two points left. We only got five extra points.

subtitles.original: The levels down here don't mean anything.
subtitles.english: The levels down here don't mean anything.

subtitles.original: Oh five, but you don't really get anything.
subtitles.english: Oh five, but you don't really get anything.

subtitles.original: Alchemy quality stage 1... I guess I can go five. That's fine, okay.
subtitles.english: Alchemy quality stage 1... I guess I can go five. That's fine, okay.

subtitles.original: I don't need HP for the raid, I've never went down below half.
subtitles.english: I don't need HP for the raid, I've never went down below half.

subtitles.original: ダブに賭けるしかねえ！
subtitles.english: We have no choice but to bet on the double-up!
